name: Sahara Desert Adventure
description: Experience the magic of the Sahara with camel rides, stargazing, and traditional Berber camps.

name: Bali Temple Trail
description: Explore ancient temples, lush rice terraces, and spiritual ceremonies across Bali.

name: Northern Lights Expedition
description: Chase the aurora borealis across the Arctic wilderness with expert guides.

name: Amalfi Coast Sailing
description: Sail along the stunning Amalfi Coast with stops at Positano, Ravello, and hidden coves.

name: Machu Picchu Trek
description: Trek the Inca Trail through cloud forests and Andean peaks to the lost city.

name: Tokyo Street Food Tour
description: Dive into Tokyo's legendary street food scene across Shibuya, Shinjuku, and Asakusa.
